titleStmt.title: SII 28.32: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 32. (A.R. No. 32 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of

States that Adisūdamaṅgalam alias Chembiyaṉ-Kaḷattūr was the kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadānam (village granted to god without involving the eviction of tenants) of God Kuṟṟam-poṟutta-nāyaṉār of Tirukkuraṅgāḍu-tuṟai in Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai-Irājaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu which included all the appertaining land of that village. It appears that the village was subject to the system of karai and that exectly half of the 18 karais of the village, had been sold to the God by three individuals in conjuction with their other relatives who had share rights in the karai, in four instalments, the first sale having been effected in the year 27, Tulā. An amount of 75,000 kāśu is stated to have been realised by the individuals in the sale. The circumstances under which the individual gained the rights in the village which is referred to have been the god's own dēvadāna and why the God purchased only half of the 18 karais from the individuals referred to are explained in a phrase i-nilan-kuḻi muṟṟil but its meaning is obscure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarāca tevaṟku yāṇṭu 33vatu vaṭakarai Irācaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷūṟ kūṟṟattu tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyār
kuṟṟam poṟutta nāyaṉār kuṭiniṅkā(t) tevatāṉam Ati cūtamaṅkalamāṉa cempiyaṉ kaḷattūṟku kiḻpāṟkellai kiḻmuttūr Ellaikku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai naṉṉai Ellaikkuñ cut
tamali Ellaikkum vaṭakku mipāṟ kellai tattaṉūr Ellaikkum peruneṟkuṉṟattu Ellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaḻaṉivāy Ellaikkum Ukaḷūr Ellaikkum teṟkum Āka Ikkuṟitta In
nāṉkellai Uḷnaṭuvupaṭṭa naṉceyum punceyum nattamum Eriyum Erinir kovaiyum potuvum potāriyum maṉṟum kanṟunilai pāḻum kaḷarum kaḷḷiyum meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻ nokkiṉa ki
ṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa Innilaṅ kuḻi muṟṟil Innāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka viṟṟa kuḷattūruṭaiyān tiruvaiyāṟu yāṉ tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyāṉum
kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ periya tevaṉ Ulakanātanum kaḷattūruṭaiyān tiruvāttuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Ātittatevaṉ Āka Immuvomum Ivvāṇṭu vṛccikanāya ṟṟu nāṅkaḷ Āṟil nālopātiyāl viṟṟa karai nālaraiyu
m Ināḷil I ḷil kaḷattūruṭaiyān tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyān tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyāṉu mivan tampi O kriyāṉumivan tampi nilāvaṉa cuntarapperunāṉu mivan tampi tiruvuṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉum kaḷattūru
ṭaiyān cattivaṉapperumāḷ pañcanata n tiruvarattuṟai Uṭaiyān Ātitta tevanum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūril viṟṟa karai nālaraiyu
m Ittevaṟku 27vatu tulānāyaṟṟu kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvarattuṟai ṭayān Ātittatevaṉen viṟṟakarai ṉṟum Innāḷil kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalattamutu Uyyak koṇṭāṉeṉ viṟṟakarai Oru māvum
Innāḷil kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ kārāṇaivi kaṉ poṟṟiyeṉ viṟṟakarai kāle Araikkālu mivāṇṭu vṛ- bha nāyaṟṟuk kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyāṉumivaṉ tampi
maḻakiyāṉumivaṉ tampi tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉum kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ cattivaṉap perumāḷ pañcana vāṇaṉum Āka Ivvaṉaivom viṟṟa karai Oṉṟum Ittevaṟku 2 10 8vatu siṁhanāya
ṟṟuk kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Entai Īcaṉ cūriyatevaṉum Ivaṉ tampi makaṉ tiruvāttuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Ātittatevaṉum kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ nilāvaṉa cuntaraṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉum Immu
vom viṟṟa raiyum Āka Ippaṭi ṭu Aṉupokamāyp pokkiṟa karai patiṉeṭṭil Innāyaṉāṟkut tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta llu cempātiyāl vanta kaṟai Oṉpatiṉāl vanta naṉceyum puṉceyum nattamum Eriyum Erinir kovaiyum
potuvum potāriyum maṉṟum kaṉṟu nilaipāḻum kaḷaruṅkaḷariyum meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Aka
ppaṭa Innāyaṉāṟkut tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟup piramāṇattiṉ meṟpaṭṭa kācu Eḻuttu Aiyyāyiramum nerākakkoṇṭu Ippiramāṇappaṭika
ḷukku kalveṭṭuEnds here.
Digital edition of SII 28.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
